zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Merbury於大約1412年出生在英國賀福爾利沙拉爾時，她的父親John Merbury37歲，母親Alice Pembridge41歲。她於1427年與Sir Walter Devereux結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年4月22日之前在英國賀福爾波登哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Merbury于大约1412年出生在英国賀福爾利沙拉爾时，她的父亲John Merbury37岁，母亲Alice Pembridge41岁。她于1427年与Sir Walter Devereux结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年4月22日之前在英国賀福爾波登哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Merbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Marbury in Great Budworth, or, perhaps, from Marbury cum Quoisley (both in Cheshire). Both placenames derive from Old English mere ‘pool, lake’ + burh ‘fortress’ (dative byrig), ‘stronghold by the lake’.

variant of Marbrow, itself a variant of Marlborough, a habitational name from Marlborough (Wiltshire), which probably derives from an Old English personal name Mǣrla + Old English beorg ‘hill, mound’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Merbury was born about 1412, in Lyonshall, Herefordshire, England, her father, John Merbury, was 37 and her mother, Alice Pembridge, was 41. She married Sir Walter Devereux in 1427. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died before 22 April 1459, in Bodenham, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Merbury est née environ 1412, à Lyonshall, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Merbury, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice Pembridge, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Devereux en 1427. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée avant 22 avril 1459, à Bodenham, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Merbury um 1412 in Lyonshall, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Merbury 37 und ihre Mutter Alice Pembridge 41. Sie hat 1427 Sir Walter Devereux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb vor 22. April 1459 in Bodenham, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Merburyが約1412年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリオンシャルで生まれた時，父John Merburyは37歳，母Alice Pembridgeは41歳であった。1427年にSir Walter Devereuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1459年4月22日以前にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアボデンハムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Merbury(이)가 대략 1412년 영국 허퍼드실르 리샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Merbury(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Pembridge(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1427년 Sir Walter Devereux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 4월 22일 이전 영국 허퍼드실르 보데함에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Merbury nasceu aproximadamente 1412, em Lyonshall, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Merbury, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice Pembridge, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Devereux em 1427. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 22 de abril de 1459, em Bodenham, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Merbury родилась около 1412 г. в местности леншолл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Merbury было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Pembridge, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Devereux в 1427 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла перед 22 апрель 1459 г. в местности боденам, хирефордшир, Англия.
